push.name: Push values
push.description: Send selected Home Assistant entity values to Živý Obraz immediately.

push_values.name: Push custom values
push_values.description: Send multiple custom values to Živý Obraz immediately.

entry_id.name: Config entry ID

name.name: Instance name
name.description: Optional instance name. Leave empty to push to all configured instances.

values.description: List of Živý Obraz variable names and values.
